items.title: Hội Báo toàn quốc sẽ thảo luận về AI, bản quyền
items.summary: Từ ngày 19-21/6, thành phố Hải Phòng sẽ tổ chức Hội Báo toàn quốc và Diễn đàn Báo chí toàn quốc năm 2026, thảo luận nhiều chủ đề trong đó có ứng dụng AI.

items.title: Giữ nước chống cháy làm rừng tràm U Minh Hạ suy tàn
items.summary: Việc giữ nước chống cháy quanh năm làm mất quy luật ngập - khô tự nhiên, khiến hàng trăm ha rừng tràm U Minh Hạ suy kiệt và chết hàng loạt, theo chuyên gia.

items.title: Quá trình Mỹ vượt ngờ vực để đạt thỏa thuận với Iran
items.summary: Dù còn hoài nghi về cam kết của Iran, các quan chức Mỹ đều thống nhất rằng vẫn phải ký thỏa thuận vì sau cùng, cuộc chiến cần khép lại.

items.title: Iran sẽ rước linh cữu cố lãnh tụ Ali Khamenei qua Iraq
items.summary: Thị trưởng Tehran cho biết linh cữu cố lãnh tụ tối cao Ali Khamenei sẽ được rước qua Iraq trước lễ chôn cất tại Iran vào đầu tháng 7.

items.title: Thủ tướng đề nghị doanh nhân Việt tại Nga phát huy vai trò cầu nối kinh tế
items.summary: Thủ tướng Lê Minh Hưng gặp kiều bào tại Kazan, kêu gọi các doanh nhân trở thành cầu nối đưa hàng Việt vào thị trường Nga và Liên minh Kinh tế Á - Âu.

items.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its interest rate decision.

items.title: Trump says he likes idea of blaming Vance if Iran deal doesn't work out
items.summary: President Trump at the G7 summit said the memorandum of understanding reached with Iran "might not be the kind of document that I should be signing."

items.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
items.summary: JetBlue is planning to cut some employee bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and tech bases at New York's LaGuardia Airport.

items.title: Trump sabotages Senate bid to fast-track Clayton as DNI, committee scuttles hearing
items.summary: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.

items.title: CEOs of Anthropic and Google DeepMind call for U.S.-led AI coalition in meeting at G7
items.summary: Tech leaders and heads of state, including President Donald Trump, joined a meeting about AI standards at the G7 Summit.

items.title: Fed holds interest rates steady: Here's what that means for credit cards, savings rates, mortgages and car loans
items.summary: Here’s a look at how the Fed's June interest rate decision may affect your finances.

items.title: Amazon AI exec predicts first 'commercially useful' quantum computers in 5-7 years
items.summary: Quantum computing is becoming an increasingly competitive field, with tech giants including Microsoft, Google and IBM developing the technology.

items.title: Allbirds continues AI pivot with name change and CEO hire, sending stock soaring
items.summary: Allbirds became NewBird AI in April and said it would trade shoes for AI compute infrastructure.

items.title: CarMax shares fall after used car retailer reports earnings beats, CEO details turnaround plan
items.summary: Despite the beats, questions remain about the company's ability to grow and cut costs under the plan amid tougher market conditions, including margin pressure.

items.title: Less than one-third of global workers feel their jobs are safe, ADP survey data shows
items.summary: Even with global unemployment at historically low levels, workers are not feeling secure.

items.title: UniQure to seek FDA approval for Huntington's disease gene therapy after previous clash with agency
items.summary: The announcement comes months after UniQure became embroiled in a public debate with FDA leaders over the clinical trial data supporting its application.

items.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.

items.title: WGC: Nhiều ngân hàng trung ương đưa vàng dự trữ về nước
items.summary: Ngày càng nhiều ngân hàng trung ương chọn dự trữ vàng trong nước, thay vì gửi ở nước ngoài để giảm rủi ro tiếp cận tài sản ở nước ngoài, theo Hội đồng Vàng Thế giới.

items.title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
items.summary: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

items.title: Mastodon looks to newsletters to help revive the open social web
items.summary: Mastodon’s newly launched newsletter feature lets anyone subscribe to creators by email, even without a Mastodon account.

items.title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
items.summary: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.

items.title: Two Stanford grads raise $11M to build a noninvasive wearable for hormone tracking
items.summary: Clair Health will track inflammation and bloating markers, energy levels, and cycle phase classification to give insights into cycle irregularities and perimenopause, as well as hormonal fluctuations, and how to navigate those changes.

items.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
items.summary: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversational Gemini interactions.

items.title: PayPal Ventures shutters as company restructuring continues
items.summary: The corporate venture arm ends after 10 years and 80 investments.

items.title: The slowtech revolution is here to kill your phone addiction and rescue your attention span
items.summary: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

items.title: Amazon has lagged OpenAI and Anthropic, but AI chief sees path to catch up in 'coming year'
items.summary: Amazon's Nova2 model is behind the latest releases from LLM leaders OpenAI and Anthropic.
